title: Tangy Tomato Toast
description: A simple open-faced toast dish with a tangy twist. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Juicy Tomato
ingredients.notes: Fresh, ripe tomatoes are a must for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Tangy
ingredients.notes: A drizzle of tangy sauce adds a nice flavor to the dish.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan Bread (or similar)
ingredients.notes: A crusty bread is perfect for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Toast
ingredients.notes: A piece of toasted bread is the base for this dish.

instructions: 1. Toast the bread until it's lightly browned.
2. Cut the juicy tomatoes into small chunks.
3. Drizzle the tangy sauce over the toasted bread.
4. Top the bread with the juicy tomato chunks.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
